notes: Exceptional report with deep, specific competitor analysis (product names, Gartner placements, financial metrics, DDU/per-GB pricing ranges). Professionally framed with strong strategic positioning differentiation and buyer decision framework. Covers 7 current market trends (OTel, Agentic AI, LLM observability, cost governance, consolidation, business observability, security convergence) with clear competitive impact linkages. Well-structured Markdown with 12-dimension comparison table. Minor deductions: (1) Agent did not invoke web search despite task preference and tools being available—relied entirely on knowledge base (acceptable given quality but suboptimal per instructions); (2) Created duplicate files (`market_research.md` and `market_research_1.md`) when only one was needed. Report reads like professional business analyst deliverable suitable for strategy meeting.
